description_long: This armchair features a minimalist Scandinavian-inspired design with a light wood frame and open, angular armrests. The seat and back are generously padded with large, overstuffed gray fabric cushions that appear soft and inviting. The back of the chair is visually distinctive, with a series of vertical wooden slats providing both structural support and a decorative element. The armrests are flat and squared, matching the pale wood of the legs and frame, and extend slightly beyond the seat. The legs are slender and straight, giving the chair a light, airy appearance. The overall look is modern yet comfortable, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings such as patios, parks, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A modern armchair with a light wood frame, open armrests, and large gray fabric cushions. The design is minimalist and comfortable, with vertical slats at the back and a soft, inviting seat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, plush gray cushions and the open, squared wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the cushions and the angular, open wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the vertical wooden slats and the full width of the back cushion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the profile of the cushions and the open structure of the armrests and legs.
attribute_backrest_style: tall, rectangular, with large cushion and vertical wooden slats
